note: Tunable knobs for FragBot. Each knob is a server cvar (the substrate is komodo's KTX moveprobe patch + KTX frogbot), mapped to the DeepFrag dial it moves and the human band we want to hit. `exists:false` knobs are NEW MOVEMENT CODE FragBot must add — no KTX cvar produces them today (that's the whole point: aim is solved, movement is the frontier). Sweep these with the komodo mode-sweep harness; score each run with score_bot.py (NOT raw bunnyhop speed).

substrate.movement_brain: komodobots experiments/ktx_moveprobe/frogbot-moveprobe.patch (modes 0-25; mode 23 = live hybrid bunnyhop). Per-slot cvars: <cvar>_s<N>.
substrate.aim_brain: KTX frogbot src/bot_botimp.c setSkillAttributes (linear skill/20 table). See qw-stats/docs/bot_dials_and_calibration.md sec 6.

groups.movement: THE FRONTIER. Moves coupling/RJ/airborne/strafe-aim. Where FragBot earns its difference.
groups.aim: SOLVED by KTX skill. For realism, dial DOWN to the human band, do not max.

knobs.notes: Selects the movement controller. 0=stock frogbot (coupling ~0). 23=hybrid bunnyhop (komodo live). FragBot will add its own mode that COUPLES view to strafe.
NEW CODE. How strongly the bot turns its view WITH the strafe heading during air-accel. The single most important human-likeness knob; no KTX cvar exists. 0 = robotic (current), ~0.35 = human.
OFF in default skill mode -> frogbot ~0.14 RJ/min. Turn on, but frequency also needs movement competence.
NEW CODE. Target rocket-jumps-per-minute for MAP MOBILITY (not just combat). Humans RJ to move; frogbots don't.
Mode-23 carrot pass radius (komodo LawParams). Sweepable via mode23_sweep.py.
NEW CODE. Bias the bot to keep moving while firing instead of planting. Frogbot deals 87% of damage slow.
Linear skill/20 sets aim error + volatility + reaction. WARNING: even skill 10 OUT-AIMS strong humans. For realism set LOWER (~3-6) or override the aim cvars directly. Don't max.
Direct aim-error override (KTX FB_CVAR_YAW_MAX_ERROR). Higher = worse aim = more human. Use when skill granularity is too coarse.
Aim penalty vs airborne targets. 0 (skill 20) = perfect airshot tracking. RAISE for human-like (humans miss airborne targets).
How much the bot favors LG. Skill 0=0.2, skill 20=1.0.
